name: dat_pipelines
description: Data pipeline definitions with source, sink, schedule, status, and health metrics

schedule.description: Cron expression or trigger type (null for CDC/streaming)

last_run_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful run

last_error.description: Last error message if the pipeline is in a failed or degraded state

owner.description: Team or person responsible for this pipeline

name: dat_quality_checks
description: Data quality rule executions with pass/fail results and affected row counts

rule_name.description: Name of the data quality rule

rows_checked.description: Total rows evaluated by this check

rows_failed.description: Number of rows that failed the check

run_at.description: Timestamp when the check was executed

details.description: Additional context or sample failing values

name: dat_anomalies
description: Detected data anomalies with severity, affected pipeline, and resolution tracking

pipeline_id.description: Reference to dat_pipelines where the anomaly was detected

detected_at.description: Timestamp when the anomaly was first detected

description.description: Human-readable description of the anomaly and its potential impact

affected_table.description: Specific table or entity type affected

baseline_value.description: Expected baseline value for the anomalous metric

observed_value.description: Observed value that triggered the anomaly alert

resolved_at.description: Timestamp when the anomaly was resolved

name: dat_schemas
description: Schema registry records with version history and compatibility tracking

schema_name.description: Schema identifier (e.g., table name, topic name, entity type)

schema_definition.description: Schema field definitions as a JSON object

breaking_change.description: Whether this version introduces a breaking change from the previous version

registered_at.description: Date this schema version was registered

downstream_consumers.description: List of pipelines or systems consuming this schema

name: dat_lineage_nodes
description: Data lineage graph nodes representing datasets, transforms, and pipeline endpoints

node_name.description: Human-readable name of this lineage node

system.description: System or service this node belongs to (e.g., Postgres, BigQuery, pipeline-worker)

entity_or_table.description: Specific table, topic, entity, or dataset this node represents

pipeline_id.description: Reference to dat_pipelines if this node is part of a managed pipeline

schema_name.description: Reference to dat_schemas (schema version in use at this node)

freshness_sla_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable age of data at this node in minutes

last_updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent data change at this node
